seo.description: Open-source Unity editor tools for asset health, dependencies, textures, materials, and Addressables.

props.title: Unity Tools
paragraphs: Tools that help keep Unity projects healthy — finding unused assets, missing references, texture issues, and Addressables problems.

cards.title: Unity-Dependencies-Hunter
cards.description: Finds unreferenced assets by scanning all files in your Unity project.

cards.title: Unity-MissingReferences-Hunter
cards.description: Detects missing references by scanning asset GUIDs across the project.

cards.title: Unity-Textures-Hunter
cards.description: Summary of all textures and atlases in a Unity project.

cards.title: Unity-Scanner
cards.description: Unified Editor and MCP tool for project health analysis across dependencies, materials, textures, addressables, and more.

cards.title: Unity-Addressables-BuildLayout-Inspector
cards.description: Analyze Addressables build layouts — bundles, groups, assets, duplicates, and cross-build comparisons.

cards.title: Unity-Materials-Hunter
cards.description: Summary of all materials and renderers in a Unity project.

cards.title: Unity-Asset-Inspector
cards.description: Inspect asset references, serialized dependencies, and optional Addressables/bundle context.

cards.title: Unity-Lite-Editor-Coroutines
cards.description: Lightweight alternative to Unity Editor Coroutines.
